variants.title: Filtrec R143G25B Return Filter
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec R143G25B. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the R143G25B provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Return Filter, Media: Glass Fiber, Efficiency 1: 20µ @ β200, Efficiency 2: 22µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 99.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 40.5 mm, Length: 256.0 mm, Bypass Pressure: 1.7 BAR bar, Δ Collapse Pressure: 10 bar, Seal Material: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 20µ @ β200, Media Type: Glass Fiber, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Bypass Pressure Bypass pressure relieve build-up of pressure within the system and allows medium to bypass the element when pressure increases and reaches a sufficient level.: 1.7 BAR, Collapse Pressure: 10 BAR, Seal: Nitrile

variants.title: Donaldson P171544 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge | Replaces the Filtrec R143G25B
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P171544 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge | Replaces the Filtrec R143G25B
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P171544 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge is designed to provide superior protection for your hydraulic system, effectively capturing contaminants to ensure clean fluid circulation. With high-quality filtration media, it extends equipment life, improves operational efficiency, and maintains fluid cleanliness even in the most demanding environments. Built for industrial, agricultural, and heavy-duty applications, this filter offers excellent dirt-holding capacity and flow efficiency. Its easy installation and maintenance help reduce downtime, making it a reliable choice for keeping hydraulic systems running smoothly.

variants.title: Fleetguard HF29160 Hydraulic Filters | Replaces the Filtrec R143G25B
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard HF29160 Hydraulic Filters | Replaces the Filtrec R143G25B
variants.description: Fleetguard® HF29160 hydraulic cartridge filter with synthetic media is designed to help keep your precision hydraulic systems running as intended, providing a solution for various applications.  This filter meets or exceeds the equipment OEM quality and performance and is the first aftermarket replacement available on the market today, bringing your operation top-quality performance and an overall unbeatable total cost of ownership.
